experiences.title: Graduate Research Assistant
experiences.subtitle: Oregon State University
workDescription: Developed BugSleuth, an innovative unsupervised fault localization technique that leverages a Genetic Algorithm to combine results from diverse fault localization methods, enhancing bug localization without the need for training data.

Treating fault localization as an optimization problem, BugSleuth efficiently consolidates ranked lists of suspicious code elements, achieving superior performance compared to standalone and state-of-the-art methods.
Validated on 704 defects from 16 real-world Java projects, BugSleuth demonstrated exceptional effectiveness and practicality, significantly improving debugging workflows with minimal runtime overhead

experiences.title: Sr. Technology Associate
experiences.subtitle: Colgate Global Business Services
workDescription: Redesigned SAP material management workflows using parallel processing and milestone tracking; identified process bottlenecks and KPIs, leading to a 70% improvement in material creation efficiency.
Deployed a robust RESTful web service utilizing OData and SAP HANA calculation views, achieving a 91.67%reduction in Request Inbox response time.
Automated Finance Master Data load process, transitioning from a file transfer approach to a secure Webdynpro application,cutting data load time from 8 hours to a few minutes.
Spearheaded the transformation of operational and KPI reporting into real-time data visualization dashboards, eliminating 32 business hours of manual intervention monthly.
Led analysis of Finished Goods Material data, identifying attribute usage patterns that informed ML-based SKU creation recommendations, streamlining auto-validation processes

experiences.title: Research Intern
experiences.subtitle: ISRO: Indian Space Research Organization
workDescription: Led a project called “Automated Wetland Delineation using Deep Learning” whose objective was to develop an automated system for mapping wetlands in pre and post-monsoon hyperspectral LISS-III image data

Designed and developed a simple atrous convolution neural network for segmentation of wetlands that also highlighted commission and omission errors faced during manual wetland delineation thereby reducing the manual validation effort by 80% by being utilized as a quality control tool in ISRO.

Generated a model that outperformed the traditional U-Net architectures producing a more consistent segmentation output and using 100 times less trainable parameters, consuming less space and generating a faster output achieving a training dice coefficient of 0.68 and a validation dice coefficient of 0.65.

experiences.title: Co-founder & Full Stack Developer
experiences.subtitle: Viva Mind: Mental Health and Wellness Tracker
workDescription: Spearheaded the development and launch of a mental health tracking platform on the MERN stack, accomplishing over 5,000 active users and boosting user retention by 20% through seamless integrations with popular mental health services.

Implemented AI-driven sentiment analysis on user journal entries, enhancing user engagement by 25% and achieving a 75% user satisfaction rate through personalized recommendations and mood-based content.
Architected a secure, scalable MongoDB data model, supporting 1 million+ data points and laying the foundation for B2B therapist integrations, with projected revenue growth of 30%.
